steps.title: Factor the target expression
steps.content:
The target expression contains the same quantity as the given equation.
$$-24-4x=-4(6+x)$$

steps.title: Use the given value
steps.content:
Since $6+x=4$, substitute $4$ into the factored expression.
$$-4(6+x)=-4(4)$$
$$-4(4)=-16$$
The answer is A.
